prestazioni: APR Stage 2+ ECU/TCU flash for the **EA888 Gen 3 (CJXC/CJXB)** engine with 93 octane fuel, targeting 320 HP and 350 lb-ft torque via upgraded **IS38 turbocharger** (hybridized with a **Precision Turbo 5762** compressor wheel for reduced lag and 22 PSI peak boost), paired with a **Cobb Tuning high-flow downpipe** (3.5" catted) and **APR Carbonio intake system** (ram-air design with heat-shielded filter)

Full **034 Motorsport Motorsport Engine Mount Kit** (polyurethane inserts with billet aluminum housings) and **Neuspeed PowerMaxx Engine Mount Inserts** to eliminate EA888 torque steer under aggressive launches, combined with a **South Bend Clutch Stage 3 Daily** (organic/copper hybrid disc with billet flywheel) for 450 lb-ft torque capacity

KW Suspension **Clubsport Coilovers** (3-way adjustable damping, 24mm front/20mm rear ride height adjustment) with **034 Motorsport Motorsport Rear Subframe Kit** (polyurethane bushings and reinforced brackets) and **H&R Super Sport Springs** (20mm drop) for optimized camber/caster via **Whiteline Adjustable Front Control Arms** (2.5° negative camber) and **Neuspeed Rear Adjustable Toe Arms**
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 Widebody Kit** (MK7-specific, 30mm front/40mm rear fender flares) with **APR Carbon Fiber Front Lip** and **VMR V710 19x9.5 ET35 wheels** (staggered setup: 245/35/19 front, 265/30/19 rear) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R** tires (240 treadwear)

**Eurocode Tuning Rear Diffuser** (carbon fiber, MK7-specific) paired with **AWE Touring Exhaust** (76mm dual tips, resonated center section) and **VWR R-Line Rear Spoiler** (carbon fiber, 30mm height adjustment)

**OEM+ Euro-spec LED Headlights** (Lux H8 V4 projectors with **Morimoto XB35 HID Bulbs**) and **VWR R-Line Front Grille** (gloss black honeycomb mesh) with **VW Racing Line Side Skirts** (painted in **Nardo Gray**, matching the **PPG Global Refine Urethane** full respray)
